race.comment: AN LAOCHMOR (13) raced prominently prior to securing a 1.75L victory in a 1005m handicap at Dundalk at the start of this month. Selected to deliver his first success on turf. ARCTIC STEPS (3) lost out by 1.5L placing second contesting a 1005m handicap at Dundalk just over five weeks ago. Expected to play a leading role. POLAR BEAR (11) returned to action with a 5L fourth competing in a 1207m handicap at this venue end of last month. Holds strong claims of recording his second success over this distance. SPORTING HERO (2) is another with claims following a 3L sixth tackling 1005m at Bellewstown.
